# services.cockpit

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.cockpit`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.cockpit.allowed-origins` | `list of string` | List of allowed origins. Maps to the WebService.Origins setting and allows merging from multiple modules. |
| `services.cockpit.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Cockpit. |
| `services.cockpit.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open port for cockpit. |
| `services.cockpit.package` | `package` | The Cockpit package to use. |
| `services.cockpit.plugins` | `list of package` | List of cockpit plugins. This add the passthru.cockpitPath of the packages to the systemd cockpit service. |
| `services.cockpit.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port where cockpit will listen. |
| `services.cockpit.settings` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Settings for cockpit that will be saved in /etc/cockpit/cockpit.conf. See the [documentation](https://cockpit-project.org/guide/latest/cockpit.conf.5.html), that is also available with `man cockpit.conf.5` for details. |
| `services.cockpit.showBanner` | `boolean` | Whether to add the Cockpit banner to the issue and motd files. |
